perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a male host wearing a newsboy cap and yellow hoodie in a small circular overlay at the bottom right. The main screen shows a 'SCAM ALERT' graphic over a world map. (2) Transition to a woman looking up as money falls around her in an office setting. (3) Scene shifts to a dark room filled with computer monitors displaying green waveforms. (4) An elderly woman with glasses and a purple cardigan (Daisy) is introduced. (5) Daisy is shown in various domestic settings talking on a vintage pink rotary-style telephone. (6) A tabby cat appears on the table next to Daisy while she is on the phone. (7) A young woman in a server room is seen smiling at a monitor showing Daisy. (8) The video concludes with the host back in the main frame, gesturing towards the camera while asking a final question.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, enthusiastic male voice begins narrating in Mandarin. (2) Digital sound effects accompany the appearance of graphics. (3) A brief snippet of an elderly female voice speaking English with a British accent is heard saying 'I'm your worst nightmare'. (4) The male narrator's voice remains dominant throughout, maintaining a steady, professional yet engaging tone until the end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Top banners show '3c 有意思 tim 哥', '@3ctim', and 'miko' brand logo. (2) Decorative hook text: '英國利用 AI 打造詐騙剋星！' (UK uses AI to create a scam killer!) appears in a red/yellow box. (3) Functional subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the host's narration. (4) Graphic text: 'SCAM ALERT' and '一兆美元' (One trillion USD). (5) Character introduction: 'AI 阿嬤 Daisy'. (6) Humor tag: '已讀亂回' (Read but replied nonsense). (7) Closing question: '這樣反詐騙方法 你們覺得怎麼樣' (What do you think of this anti-scam method?).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Problem Identification (Scam stats) -> Solution Reveal (AI Daisy) -> Results Demo -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator (host), 1 woman with money, 1 elderly woman (Daisy), 1 woman in server room.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male host wearing a patterned newsboy cap, glasses, and a bright yellow hooded sweatshirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional studio with acoustic panels for the host; a messy office with falling bills; a dark tech-focused room with multiple computer screens; a cozy domestic living room for the AI character.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Studio lighting for host, cinematic warm lighting for AI Daisy, and dim blue light for the server room.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform the audience about a specific technological advancement in the UK where an AI-generated character named Daisy is used to waste the time of scammers, thereby protecting potential victims and disrupting scam operations. The host seeks to share interesting tech news while subtly promoting the 'miko' brand.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of the 'miko' logo in the top banner throughout the entire video and personal branding of '3cTim'.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host's trademark newsboy cap and the '3c 有意思 tim 哥' branding overlay.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy delivery typical of tech influencers to make news content more engaging for social media viewers. The use of an AI 'Grandma' persona adds a humorous and relatable human element to a technical topic.
